<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>Destinations</title>
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="css/styles.css">
</head>
<body>

  <nav>
    <div class="logo"> Travel Central</div>
    <div>
      <a href="https://cdpn.io/pen/debug/myVXPjd?authentication_hash=RBrOJpKKpvJM">Home</a>
      <a href="https://cdpn.io/pen/debug/MYKQOmB?authentication_hash=DqADdQxxQvwA" class="active">Destinations</a>
      <a href="https://cdpn.io/pen/debug/EaPQvqX?authentication_hash=dGkXWevveqVA">Booking</a>
      <a href="https://cdpn.io/pen/debug/KwVQXpV?authentication_hash=XBAGRWVVWwKr">About</a>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <main>
    
      
    </section>
<section class="carousel-container">
  <div class="carousel-track">
    <div class="card">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Paris">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Paris, France</h3>
        <p>The city of lights and love awaits you.</p>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Kyoto">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Kyoto, Japan</h3>
        <p>Explore temples, gardens, and ancient traditions.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://www.shutterstock.com/image-photo/aerial-view-barcelona-eixample-residential-600nw-2163690845.jpg" alt="Barcelona">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Barcelona, Spain</h3>
        <p>Stroll through Gaudí’s masterpieces, soak in the Mediterranean sun, and experience the vibrant soul of Catalan.</p>
      </div>
      </div>
    
<div class="card">
      <img src="https://www.theknickerbocker.com/content/uploads/2024/02/knb_nyc_landmarks_times_square_1138719689.webp" alt="New York">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>New York, USA</h3>
        <p>Feel the energy of the city that never sleeps, from Times Square and Central Park to Broadway.</p>
      </div>
      </div>
    
  <div class="card">
      <img src="https://media.istockphoto.com/id/539115110/photo/colosseum-in-rome-and-morning-sun-italy.jpg?s=612x612&w=0&k=20&c=9NtFxHI3P2IBWRY9t0NrfPZPR4iusHmVLbXg2Cjv9Fs=" alt="Rome">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Rome, Italy</h3>
        <p>Walk in the footsteps of emperors, explore ancient ruins.</p>
      </div>
      </div>
    
  <div class="card">
      <img src="https://www.peru.travel/Contenido/Atractivo/Imagen/en/129/1.1/Principal/historical-center-of-lima.jpg" alt="Lima">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Lima, Peru</h3>
        <p>Uncover Peru’s coastal charm, rich history, and world-renowned cuisine.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
  <div class="card">
      <img src="https://cache.marriott.com/is/image/marriotts7prod/kohsamui-romantic1:Wide-Hor?wid=2880&fit=constrain" alt="Koh Samui">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Koh Samui, Thailand</h3>
        <p>Relax on palm-fringed beaches, explore hidden waterfalls.</p>
      </div>
      </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://media.audleytravel.com/-/media/images/home/europe/uk/england/country-guides/experience-london-like-a-local/istock_495568935_england_view_of_westminster_at_night_london_5x7.webp?q=79&w=800&h=571" alt="London">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>London, England</h3>
        <p>A timeless mix of history and modernity, explore royal landmarks.</p>
    </div>
      </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      
      <img src="https://www.travelandleisure.com/thmb/zOoWmlL-mXOdBHocsAuqoE5uIrM=/1500x0/filters:no_upscale():max_bytes(150000):strip_icc()/st-regis-bora-bora-SKYLARSRBORA1119-9e4dbc0c5e074c598d933f4e6f3b623d.jpg" alt="Bora,Bora">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Bora,Bora</h3>
        <p>Escape to turquoise lagoons, overwater bungalows, and postcard-perfect sunsets.</p>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://bookmychutti.com/wp-content/uploads/2022/06/bali4-scaled.jpg" alt="Bali,Indonesia">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3> Bali,Indonesia</h3>
        <p> From lush rice terraces to sacred temples, this Indonesian gem offers a spiritual and scenic retreat.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://img.andrewprokos.com/DUBAI-MARINA-NIGHT-6223-COLOR-1200PX-1200x900-cropped.jpg" alt="Dubai">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3> Dubai</h3>
        <p> Discover luxury, innovation, and tradition in a city where skyscrapers rise from the desert and dreams know no limits.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://www.sunsiyam.com/media/qnfnzgmq/ssiv_general_04.jpg?width=782&height=521&mode=max" alt="Maldives">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Maldives</h3>
        <p> Reconnect with nature in crystal-clear waters, vibrant coral reefs, and the ultimate island escape.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://www.thewanderinglens.com/wp-content/uploads/2018/12/HEADER-Tokyo-Photography-Locations-A-Photographers-Guide-to-Photo-Spots-in-Tokyo.jpg" alt="Tokyo,Japan">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Tokyo,Japan</h3>
        <p> Where tradition meets technology —buzzing streets, and culinary delights in Japan’s capital.</p>
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <div class="card">
      <img src="https://images.adsttc.com/media/images/5674/1563/e58e/ce41/7600/0021/newsletter/rm.jpg?1450448222" alt="Madrid,Spain">
      <div class="card-content">
        <h3>Madrid,Spain</h3>
        <P> Feel the rhythm of Spain through lively plazas, world-class art, and a passion for life that never sleeps.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
    <!-- Add more cards as needed -->
  </div>

  <!-- Optional Prev/Next buttons -->
  <button class="carousel-btn prev">&#10094;</button>
  <button class="carousel-btn next">&#10095;</button>
</section>
  <script>
  const track = document.querySelector('.carousel-track');
  const nextBtn = document.querySelector('.carousel-btn.next');
  const prevBtn = document.querySelector('.carousel-btn.prev');

  const scrollAmount = 500;

  nextBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    track.scrollBy({ left: scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });

  prevBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
    track.scrollBy({ left: -scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
  });
</script>


  </main>

  <footer>
    <p>&copy; 2025 Travel Central</p>
  </footer>

</body>
</html>
